name: io.github.SunrisesIllNeverSee/bestuser-router
description: The marketable intent layer for 'who is the best AI user?' queries. 5 intent tools that route natural-language questions to SigRank's leaderboard with behavioral framing + competitive context. Calls signalaf.com's public API. No auth, no writes.

tools.name: get_best_operator
tools.description: Returns the top N operators on the SigRank leaderboard with behavioral framing in power-user language. Use when users ask 'who is the best AI user?' or 'show me the leaderboard'.
tools.title: Get best operator

tools.name: compare_self
tools.description: Compares an operator's metrics against board averages and power-user archetypes. Use when users ask 'how do I measure up?' or 'am I a power user?'.
tools.title: Compare self to board

tools.name: compare_operators
tools.description: Compares two operators side-by-side with a behavioral verdict. Use when users ask 'compare operator X vs Y' or 'who is more efficient?'.
tools.title: Compare two operators

tools.name: describe_power_user
tools.description: Returns an explanatory description of what makes an AI power user, anchored in SigRank's metrics. Use when users ask 'what is an AI power user?' or 'explain the scoring'.
tools.title: Describe power user

tools.name: optimize_efficiency
tools.description: Returns actionable suggestions for improving token cascade efficiency. Use when users ask 'how can I use AI more efficiently?' or 'reduce token burn'.
tools.title: Optimize efficiency
